buckets.label: Claim/Finding Collapse
buckets.description: A source claim, translated note, memo, or statement is promoted as a tribunal finding or durable fact.

buckets.label: Source Status Loss
buckets.description: The compile loses whether a row is direct, corrected, retracted, not adopted, translated, or held for clarification.

buckets.label: Identity/Alias Drift
buckets.description: Near-duplicate names, misspellings, or same-title actors are merged or split incorrectly.

buckets.label: Title/Time Scope Error
buckets.description: A title-holder is resolved without respecting the relevant date or acting-role interval.

buckets.label: Approval Semantics Collapse
buckets.description: Packet approval, payment release, receipt verification, relief certification, and translated approval language are flattened into one approval predicate.

buckets.label: Correction/Retraction Gap
buckets.description: A correction is admitted without preserving the old value, source authority, or clarification target.

buckets.label: Temporal Helper Gap
buckets.description: Duration, deadline, safety-hold, or quarantine-window reasoning lacks a supported helper or admitted body facts.

buckets.label: Rule Priority Gap
buckets.description: A lower-level permission/rule fires even though an override, anti-rule, hold, veto, or exception should block the final outcome.

buckets.label: Exception Branch Gap
buckets.description: A threshold rule works but the exception branch, such as relief cargo or sacred cargo, is missing or too broad.

buckets.label: CE Over-Eager
buckets.description: The system asks when it could safely answer, source-attribute, quarantine, or commit clear partials.

buckets.label: CE Under-Eager
buckets.description: The system commits or answers when an identity, status, rule, correction, or query scope should be clarified.

buckets.label: Unsafe Context Write
buckets.description: Context support, non-adoption status, alias notes, or rule links are copied into safe candidate operations without direct source authority.
